prompt: Can you show me delayed shipment trends over the last year?

app_definition.app_description: Analyze delayed shipment volume, cost, and delivery performance trends over the last 12 months across suppliers, regions, and shipping modes.

components.title: Delayed Shipments - Last 12 Months
components.sql_query:
SELECT 
  COUNT(*) AS delayed_orders_last_12m
FROM supply_chain
WHERE on_time_delivery = 0
  AND order_date >= strftime(date_sub('month', 12, current_date), '%Y-%m-%d');

components.title: Total Cost of Delayed Shipments - Last 12 Months
components.sql_query:
SELECT 
  SUM(total_cost + shipping_cost + warehouse_cost) AS delayed_cost_last_12m
FROM supply_chain
WHERE on_time_delivery = 0
  AND order_date >= strftime(date_sub('month', 12, current_date), '%Y-%m-%d');

components.title: Monthly Delayed Shipments - Last 12 Months
components.sql_query:
SELECT 
  strftime(order_date, '%Y-%m') AS order_month,
  COUNT(*) AS delayed_orders
FROM supply_chain
WHERE on_time_delivery = 0
  AND order_date >= strftime(date_sub('month', 12, current_date), '%Y-%m-%d')
GROUP BY order_month
ORDER BY order_month ASC;

components.title: Monthly Delayed Shipment Cost - Last 12 Months
components.sql_query:
SELECT 
  strftime(order_date, '%Y-%m') AS order_month,
  SUM(total_cost + shipping_cost + warehouse_cost) AS delayed_cost
FROM supply_chain
WHERE on_time_delivery = 0
  AND order_date >= strftime(date_sub('month', 12, current_date), '%Y-%m-%d')
GROUP BY order_month
ORDER BY order_month ASC;

components.title: Delayed Shipments by Region - Last 12 Months
components.sql_query:
SELECT 
  region,
  COUNT(*) AS delayed_orders
FROM supply_chain
WHERE on_time_delivery = 0
  AND order_date >= strftime(date_sub('month', 12, current_date), '%Y-%m-%d')
GROUP BY region
ORDER BY delayed_orders DESC;

components.title: Delayed Shipment Details - Last 12 Months
components.sql_query:
SELECT 
  order_id,
  order_date,
  supplier,
  region,
  product,
  category,
  quantity,
  total_cost,
  shipping_cost,
  warehouse_cost,
  defect_rate,
  delivery_days,
  on_time_delivery,
  shipping_mode
FROM supply_chain
WHERE on_time_delivery = 0
  AND order_date >= strftime(date_sub('month', 12, current_date), '%Y-%m-%d')
ORDER BY order_date ASC;
